summary: Reframed the opening around Delroy catching the 4:18 alarm and seeing the boots by the door, which preserves the handoff from chapter 9 while avoiding another heat-first apartment opening against chapter 11. No style-bible calibration lines appeared verbatim, and the existing chapter close already handed off cleanly into Delroy's overnight injury state in chapter 11.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to anchor the chapter on the 4:18 alarm and Delroy's boots by the door instead of another hot-apartment morning entry.
